stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You can expect (1) _____ turbulence, and (2) _____ icing.

options.a: (1) moderate to severe; (2) moderate to severe
options.b: (1) light to moderate; (2) moderate to severe
options.c: (1) light to moderate; (2) light to moderate
options.d: (1) moderate to severe; (2) light to moderate
